title: Talking Tables White and Gold Number 30 Birthday Candles for Cakes, Cake Topper Decoration, Premium Quality, One and Six Candles, Anniversary Party, Milestone Age, 5.5 cm Height, Recycled Packaging
features: Talking Tables White and Gold Number 30 Birthday Candles for Cakes, Cake Topper Decoration, Premium Quality, One and Six Candles, Anniversary Party, Milestone Age, 5.5 cm Height, Recycled Packaging

Whether it's a birthday, a milestone, or ruby and golden anniversaries, our premium number candles are ideal for marking special birthdays and significant anniversaries. Dipped in gold, they create a stunning two-tone effect for a touch of luxury.
ECO: ALL Talking Tables products are made to be either reusable or home recyclable and this include both product and packaging!
QUALITY- Our products are made to the highest quality standard and are sold in many premium high street shops in the UK and internationally
description: Product Description Talking Tables White and Gold Number 30 Birthday Candles for Cakes, Cake Topper Decoration, Premium Quality, One and Six Candles, Anniversary Party, Milestone Age, 5.5 cm Height, Recycled Packaging Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not leave burning unattended. Avoid placing near flammable materials. Extinguish the candle when the flame reaches almost the base or when it is no longer needed. Never allow a candle to burn for more than 4 hours in a row. Remove any remaining wax after the candle is extinguished and cooled.
